title: Review: bridges/wasm/ffi round 18
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — Three classes of issue dominate: (1) in-memory dedup state lost on restart (matrix SentIds, JMAP seen_ids — same root cause, no persistence layer); (2) WASM JS exception swallowing (silent failure mode for all relay events); (3) FFI TOCTOU on file existence check. None are security-critical on their own but all will generate confusing failure reports from users.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) bridge-teams Teams outgoing webhook behavior under load not verified against live Teams API; (2) WASM storage.rs IndexedDB transaction lifetime — the 'complete' event vs request success ordering is subtle and may have race conditions not exercised in review; (3) FFI flutter_rust_bridge code generation not reviewed (generated code is not in scope but wraps this code). Would raise confidence if: live integration tests for each bridge exist, and the IDB transaction lifecycle is tested in a real browser.
